hero.sub: We build websites connected to AI agents that respond to your clients instantly, qualify leads, and book appointments automatically.
hero.credibility: Designed for businesses that want more clients without manually answering every message.

blocks.question: Missing leads?
blocks.micro: When a client sends a message and no one responds within minutes, that client goes to your competitor.

blocks.question: Slow responses?
blocks.micro: Clients expect an immediate response. If you take more than a few minutes, the opportunity disappears.

blocks.question: Manual tracking?
blocks.micro: Remembering to follow up with every prospect takes time and leads to costly mistakes.

blocks.question: Lost clients?
blocks.micro: Without a system that captures, responds, and follows up, prospects never become clients.

structure.sub: We connect your website, artificial intelligence, and automation so every visitor gets an instant response and a clear path to becoming a client.

aiDemo.title: This is how the system responds to your clients.
aiDemo.sub: While you're treating patients, the system responds, qualifies, and books — without you lifting a finger.

messages.text: Hi, I've had a toothache since last night. Do you have any availability today?
Hi there! So sorry to hear that. Yes, we have urgent care slots available today. How strong is the pain from 1 to 10?
About a 7. It gets worse with cold drinks.
Got it — that's really helpful info for the doctor. For today we have 3:00pm or 5:30pm available. Which works best for you?
Perfect. I've booked you with Dr. González today at 3:00pm. Can I get your full name to set up your record?
All set, Maria 🦷 Appointment confirmed for today at 3:00pm. I just sent you a text with the office address and what to bring. Feel better soon — see you shortly! ✓

projects.sectionSub: Each system is designed to capture leads and convert them into clients automatically.

items.title: ContactMyApp — Professional Talent Marketplace
items.description: ContactMyApp redefines how professionals get hired. Talent publishes their skills and services in a dynamic marketplace where quality is rewarded with verified ratings — giving every professional real visibility and a proven track record that clients trust. More than a classifieds board: a reputation engine built to convert.

built.label: WHAT WE BUILT
items: Professional profiles with verified skills, portfolio and services listing
Smart rating & review engine that ranks professionals by quality of work
Discovery system matching clients to the right talent by specialty, location and reputation

items.title: Homee — Intelligent Neighborhood Finder
items.description: Moving is one of life's biggest decisions — and most people make it with incomplete information. Homee analyzes what matters most: distance to work, proximity to schools, hospitals, restaurants, parks, and neighborhood safety scores. Then it shows users exactly what life will look like if they move there. Not just listings — lifestyle intelligence.

built.label: WHAT WE BUILT
items: Multi-variable lifestyle scoring engine analyzing each neighborhood
Interactive map with safety, amenities, and commute time overlays
Personalized neighborhood ranking based on user-defined preferences

items.title: Hospital Universidad del Norte — Patient Digital Experience
items.description: One of Colombia's leading university hospitals needed a digital presence that matched its medical excellence. We rebuilt their institutional website and developed a secure patient portal where over 2 million users can access lab results and diagnostic imaging online — eliminating paperwork, cutting wait times, and delivering clinical results instantly.
items.imageAlt: Hospital Universidad del Norte patient portal and website

built.label: WHAT WE BUILT
items: Institutional website redesigned for trust, clarity, and accessibility
Secure portal for lab results and diagnostic imaging — available 24/7
Patient-data architecture aligned with healthcare privacy standards

metrics.label: patients with digital access to results

items.title: GPS Starr — Fleet Intelligence System
items.description: A Colombian telecommunications enterprise needed full visibility and control over its vehicle fleet. We delivered a fully custom GPS tracking solution end-to-end — from hardware sourcing and device configuration (imported directly from China) to software integration and deployment in Colombia — with real-time monitoring, route history, and operational alerts.
items.imageAlt: GPS Starr fleet tracking and control platform

built.label: WHAT WE BUILT
items: GPS hardware imported from China, configured and deployed in Colombia
Real-time fleet tracking with live position, speed, and operational alerts
Web-based control dashboard with full route history and reporting

metrics.label: time GPS tracking across entire fleet

items.title: SignTrack — Document Control & Approval Platform
items.description: Approval workflows that rely on email chains, printed forms, or shared spreadsheets create risk, delay, and zero accountability. SignTrack gives companies a structured digital workflow for purchase approvals and document sign-off — with a complete legal audit trail for every action, at every step, for every document.
items.imageAlt: SignTrack document management and digital signature platform

built.label: WHAT WE BUILT
items: Digital workflow engine for purchase approvals and multi-level sign-off
Legal-grade digital signature with full audit trail per document
Configurable for any document type — contracts, authorizations, compliance forms

metrics.label: digital audit trail on every document
